generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑mounted encoder measuring the motor shaft angle on the vertical axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EncoderAngleTransmission
]

instance GearboxSecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder placed behind the gearbox measuring output shaft angle of the vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EncoderAngleTransmission
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor (I_M) in the drive electronics providing motor current measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentTransmission
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction
instance EncoderAngleTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountedEncoder, GearboxSecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Data (raw and derived)
instance EncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of encoder angle values (raw) streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderAngleTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor current measurements streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated joint torque τ derived from current and angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular velocity ω derived from successive encoder angles"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance AngularAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular acceleration derived from velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

// C10: Engineering & simulation models
instance SysMLMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor of the vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance SysMLGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML internal block diagram of the gearwheel and cycloidal gearboxes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionFreeDrivetrainModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB‑Simulink model of the drivetrain without friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEngine
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of Coulomb‑Viscous friction for the axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEngine
]

instance SimulinkStribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of the Stribeck friction characteristic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEngine
]

instance SimulinkDahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of the Dahl friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEngine
]

instance SimulinkLuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of the LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEngine
]

instance TorqueComputationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data‑calculation model that computes torque τ from motor current and angle"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance VelocityComputationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data‑calculation model that computes angular velocity ω from encoder angles"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

instance AccelerationComputationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data‑calculation model that computes angular acceleration from velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEngine
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker handling live streaming of sensor data to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService, ParameterEstimationService
]

instance DataProcessingEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing engine that transforms raw sensor streams into derived data and feeds models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService, ParameterEstimationService, ModelParameterRefinementService
]

instance SimulinkExecutionEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink engine running the friction and drivetrain simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard visualising measured and simulated data in real time"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell representing the robot components and exposing their models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance SiemensSinumerikControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interface to the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D s‑machine providing raw sensor streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService
]

// C6: Services
instance ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight
]

instance ParameterEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimation of friction model parameters for both white‑box and black‑box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides PositioningAccuracyImprovementInsight, MotionControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of measured and simulated torque, velocity and acceleration on a dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionErrorReductionInsight
]

instance ModelParameterRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of refined model parameters to improve robot motion‑control accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides PositioningAccuracyImprovementInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Extracted friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) available for control tuning"
]

instance PositioningAccuracyImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that refined parameters improve positioning accuracy of the vertical axis"
]

instance JointFrictionErrorReductionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that identified friction reduces joint error caused by friction"
]

// C17: Actions
instance MotionControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of motion‑control algorithms in the robot controller using new friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Data acquisition and model updating occur in real‑time during robot operation, enabling continuous (online) identification of friction characteristics."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is realised as a purpose‑driven constellation consisting of a single Asset (the first axis), a set of DataTraces (measured current I_M, reference outputs r_M, r_G, r_out and simulated outputs ˆr_M, ˆr_G, ˆr_out), Processing components that execute the Simulink models, and metadata that links each trace to its source, all conforming to the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability is maintained by linking every DataPoint to the originating sensor, processing component and model, ensuring that simulated and measured data can be directly compared; the use of both white‑box analytical friction equations and black‑box data‑driven models enables validation of model fidelity against live measurements."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The physical‑to‑virtual link is realised using the MQTT protocol for real‑time streaming of sensor data; the digital shadow consumes these MQTT topics to populate its data traces."
]
